SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.consistency

Interface FileRepo

All Superinterfaces:
ProofDisposedListener
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractFileRepo, DiskFileRepo, MemoryFileRepo, SimpleFileRepo, TrivialFileRepo
public interface FileRepo extends ProofDisposedListener
This interface provides access to files. In addition, it can be used to save a consistent zip bundle containing all proof relevant files.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    OutputStream
    createOutputStream(Path path)
    This method can be used to write a file that has no counterpart outside to the FileRepo.

    Methods inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.event.ProofDisposedListener

    proofDisposed, proofDisposing

  • Method Details

    • getInputStream

      InputStream getInputStream(Path path) throws FileNotFoundException, IOException
      Provides access to a file on disk. May return null if the path cannot be handled by this repository.
      Parameters:
      path - the path of the file
      Returns:
      an InputStream of the requested file, or null
      Throws:
      FileNotFoundException - if the file does not exist
      IOException - on IO errors, e.g. if the user has no permission to read the file

    • getInputStream

      InputStream getInputStream(RuleSource ruleSource) throws IOException
      Provides access to the InputStream of a RuleSource. The file the RuleSource is read from is registered to the FileRepo. May return null if the source cannot be handled by this repository.
      Parameters:
      ruleSource - the RuleSource
      Returns:
      an InputStream of the RuleSource, or null
      Throws:
      IOException - on IO errors

    • getInputStream

      InputStream getInputStream(URL url) throws IOException
      Provides access to the InputStream of a file identified by an URL. The file is registered to the FileRepo. May return null if the url cannot be handled by this repository.
      Parameters:
      url - the URL of the file
      Returns:
      an InputStream to the file identified by the URL, or null
      Throws:
      IOException - on IO errors

    • createOutputStream

      OutputStream createOutputStream(Path path) throws FileNotFoundException
      This method can be used to write a file that has no counterpart outside to the FileRepo.
      Parameters:
      path - the path of the file to store. The path must be relative to the base directory of the proof package.
      Returns:
      an OutputStream to the file in the FileRepo
      Throws:
      FileNotFoundException - if a file with the given path exists

    • registerProof

      void registerProof(Proof proof)
      Register the proof in the FileRepo.
      Parameters:
      proof - the proof to register

    • setBootClassPath

      void setBootClassPath(Path path) throws IllegalStateException
      Sets the bootclasspath (containing available classes from the Java Class Library).
      Parameters:
      path - the bootclasspath to set (the method does nothing if null is given)
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the java path is already set

    • setClassPath

      void setClassPath(List<Path> classPath) throws IllegalStateException
      Sets the classpath.
      Parameters:
      classPath - the classpath to set (the method does nothing if null is given)
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the java path is already set

    • setJavaPath

      void setJavaPath(Path javaPath) throws IllegalStateException
      Sets the java path (where the source files are located).
      Parameters:
      javaPath - the java path to set (the method does nothing if null is given)
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the java path is already set

    • setBaseDir

      void setBaseDir(Path path)
      Sets the base directory of the proof, i.e. the main directory where the proof is loaded from. When loading Java sources this is the directory the loaded file resides in. When loading .key-Files this is the directory specified via "\\javaSource" or the directory of the .key-File, if no source directory is specified. This is needed by the FileRepo for resolving pathnames.
      Parameters:
      path - The path of the base directory. If a file is given, then its parent directory is set as base path.
